---
name: Debate
about: Propose a change to vocabulary, IDs, or framework structure
title: "[debate] <one-line proposal>"
labels: debate
assignees: ''
---

## What you're proposing

One sentence. What changes?

## What it affects

- [ ] An `aux.H*` heuristic ID or definition
- [ ] An `aux.T*` trust stage ID or definition
- [ ] A `tg.*` gap ID or definition
- [ ] A schema file in `/schemas/`
- [ ] Public vocabulary (the words we use externally)
- [ ] Other (explain)

## Why now

What's broken or unclear with the current version? Be specific. "It feels
off" is not enough.

## Migration note

If this renames or restructures something existing, what's the migration path
for documents and forks already using the old version?

## Alternatives considered

What else did you think about? Why is this proposal better?

---

> Per CONTRIBUTING.md: open a `debate` Issue **before** opening a PR for
> anything that changes an ID or introduces new vocabulary. Review is in the
> open.
